executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Backend Laravel 12 + Sanctum at http://localhost:8000. ALL API endpoints are prefixed with /api/v2/ (NOT /api/). For example login is POST /api/v2/auth/login. Provider endpoints require a Sanctum bearer token obtained from /api/v2/auth/login (response shape: {user, token, token_type:'Bearer'}). Send Authorization: Bearer <token> header. Generate comprehensive coverage across all features in the test plan; if a test depends on a created entity (e.g. customer, product) make sure to create it first within the same test. Use unique email/phone values per test to avoid uniqueness conflicts.
